requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — GSO/Kuwait MEPS for Household Refrigerating Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——家用制冷器具的GSO/科威特最低能效标准（MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——家用製冷器具的GSO/科威特最低能效標準（MEPS）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances sold in Kuwait must meet the minimum energy-performance standards (MEPS) set through GSO and applied by the Public Authority for Industry (PAI) within KUCAS. The reference is the GSO energy-efficiency standard for refrigerating appliances (GSO 2.5/FDS based on the GSO household-refrigerator energy-efficiency series, e.g. the GSO refrigerator energy-efficiency standard derived from IEC 62552 measurement methods), which establishes a minimum energy-efficiency threshold and an efficiency-rating band. Appliances below the MEPS threshold cannot be cleared for the Kuwait market. Energy consumption is measured per the IEC 62552 series (as adopted by GSO). The declared rating must correspond to the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz supply, and the energy data feeds the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report. MEPS levels in the GCC have been progressively tightened, so the current applicable threshold should be confirmed against the latest GSO standard edition before submission.
summary.zh: 在科威特销售的家用制冷器具须满足通过GSO制定、由工业公共管理局（PAI）在KUCAS框架内实施的最低能效标准（MEPS）。依据为GSO家用制冷器具能效标准（基于GSO家用电冰箱能效系列，例如源自IEC 62552测量方法的GSO电冰箱能效标准），其规定了最低能效门槛及能效评级区间。低于MEPS门槛的器具不能获准进入科威特市场。能耗按IEC 62552系列（经GSO采纳）测量。声明的额定值须对应科威特240 V、50 Hz供电，能效数据纳入KUCAS技术评估报告。海湾地区的MEPS水平已逐步收紧，因此应在提交前针对最新GSO标准版本确认当前适用门槛。
summary.zht: 在科威特銷售的家用製冷器具須滿足通過GSO制定、由工業公共管理局（PAI）在KUCAS框架內實施的最低能效標準（MEPS）。依據為GSO家用製冷器具能效標準（基於GSO家用電冰箱能效系列，例如源自IEC 62552測量方法的GSO電冰箱能效標準），其規定了最低能效門檻及能效評級區間。低於MEPS門檻的器具不能獲准進入科威特市場。能耗按IEC 62552系列（經GSO採納）測量。聲明的額定值須對應科威特240 V、50 Hz供電，能效數據納入KUCAS技術評估報告。海灣地區的MEPS水平已逐步收緊，因此應在提交前針對最新GSO標準版本確認當前適用門檻。

standards_or_laws: GSO household-refrigerator energy-efficiency standard (GCC Standardization Organization) — minimum energy-performance standard (MEPS) and efficiency rating, applied by PAI within KUCAS
IEC 62552 series (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods) — measurement basis adopted by GSO
KUCAS (Kuwait Conformity Assurance Scheme) — PAI; energy data feeds the Technical Evaluation Report
Grid rating: 240 V, 50 Hz single phase (Kuwait — MEW)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits. The standard is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the energy-labelling system administered by the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC). Products must display the China Energy Label (CEL) before sale. Although both China and GSO ultimately reference IEC 62552 measurement methods, GB 12021.2 uses a 1-to-5 grade framework while the GSO MEPS uses its own threshold and rating band — Chinese grades are not directly comparable to the GSO efficiency rating and must be re-mapped.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。GB 12021.2为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。尽管中国与GSO最终都参照IEC 62552测量方法，GB 12021.2采用1至5级框架，而GSO MEPS采用其自有门槛和评级区间——中国能效等级与GSO能效评级不可直接比较，须重新映射。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。GB 12021.2為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。儘管中國與GSO最終都參照IEC 62552測量方法，GB 12021.2採用1至5級框架，而GSO MEPS採用其自有門檻和評級區間——中國能效等級與GSO能效評級不可直接比較，須重新映射。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two main gaps exist: (1) Different rating basis — a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does NOT guarantee the appliance meets the GSO/Kuwait MEPS threshold; the energy consumption must be recalculated and re-mapped to the GSO efficiency band, and the appliance must clear the current MEPS floor (units below it cannot enter Kuwait). (2) Test data routing — although both reference IEC 62552, the energy data must be presented inside the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report and tied to the Kuwait 240 V / 50 Hz rating; a Chinese CEL test report typically rated at 220 V may need re-measurement or annotation by a KUCAS-recognised body. The applicable GSO MEPS edition and threshold should be confirmed before submission because GCC MEPS levels are periodically tightened.
gap.zh: 存在两大差距：（1）评级基准不同——中国1级或2级评定不能保证器具满足GSO/科威特MEPS门槛；能耗须重新计算并映射至GSO能效区间，且器具须达到当前MEPS下限（低于下限的产品不能进入科威特）。（2）检测数据流转——尽管两者都参照IEC 62552，能效数据须在KUCAS技术评估报告中呈现并与科威特240 V / 50 Hz额定值绑定；通常按220 V标定的中国CEL检测报告可能需要由KUCAS认可机构重新测量或加注。应在提交前确认适用的GSO MEPS版本和门槛，因为海湾MEPS水平会定期收紧。
gap.zht: 存在兩大差距：（1）評級基準不同——中國1級或2級評定不能保證器具滿足GSO/科威特MEPS門檻；能耗須重新計算並映射至GSO能效區間，且器具須達到當前MEPS下限（低於下限的產品不能進入科威特）。（2）檢測數據流轉——儘管兩者都參照IEC 62552，能效數據須在KUCAS技術評估報告中呈現並與科威特240 V / 50 Hz額定值綁定；通常按220 V標定的中國CEL檢測報告可能需要由KUCAS認可機構重新測量或加注。應在提交前確認適用的GSO MEPS版本和門檻，因為海灣MEPS水平會定期收緊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — meeting the GSO/Kuwait MEPS threshold is a condition of KUCAS clearance; appliances below the threshold cannot be placed on the Kuwait market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Meeting the GSO/Kuwait MEPS threshold is a hard gate for Kuwait market access. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not substitute for the GSO efficiency rating — energy data measured to IEC 62552 must be re-mapped to the GSO band, confirmed against the current MEPS floor, rated for 240 V / 50 Hz, and submitted inside the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 满足GSO/科威特MEPS门槛是科威特市场准入的强制性门槛。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代GSO能效评级——按IEC 62552测量的能效数据须重新映射至GSO区间、针对当前MEPS下限确认、按240 V / 50 Hz标定，并纳入KUCAS技术评估报告提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 滿足GSO/科威特MEPS門檻是科威特市場准入的強制性門檻。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代GSO能效評級——按IEC 62552測量的能效數據須重新映射至GSO區間、針對當前MEPS下限確認、按240 V / 50 Hz標定，並納入KUCAS技術評估報告提交。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — GSO/Kuwait Energy-Efficiency Label for Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——家用电冰箱的GSO/科威特能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——家用電冰箱的GSO/科威特能效標籤

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances offered for sale in Kuwait must carry the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label. The label displays the efficiency rating (a star or banded rating derived from the GSO refrigerator energy-efficiency standard), the measured annual energy consumption, and the appliance capacity, and must be affixed in Arabic (and commonly bilingual Arabic/English) at point of sale. The label rating is determined from energy-consumption testing to the IEC 62552 series as adopted by GSO and is verified within the KUCAS technical evaluation administered by PAI; the registered importer is responsible for ensuring the correct label is applied before goods are offered for sale. The label content and format follow the GSO energy-label standard for refrigerating appliances; the declared figures must correspond to the Kuwait 240 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 在科威特发售的家用制冷器具须加贴GSO/科威特能效标签。标签展示能效评级（源自GSO电冰箱能效标准的星级或区间评级）、实测年耗电量及器具容量，并须在销售点以阿拉伯文（通常为阿拉伯文/英文双语）加贴。标签评级依据经GSO采纳的IEC 62552系列能耗测试确定，并在PAI管理的KUCAS技术评估内核验；注册进口商负责确保在发售前加贴正确标签。标签内容和格式遵循GSO制冷器具能效标签标准；声明的数值须对应科威特240 V、50 Hz供电。
summary.zht: 在科威特發售的家用製冷器具須加貼GSO/科威特能效標籤。標籤展示能效評級（源自GSO電冰箱能效標準的星級或區間評級）、實測年耗電量及器具容量，並須在銷售點以阿拉伯文（通常為阿拉伯文/英文雙語）加貼。標籤評級依據經GSO採納的IEC 62552系列能耗測試確定，並在PAI管理的KUCAS技術評估內核驗；註冊進口商負責確保在發售前加貼正確標籤。標籤內容和格式遵循GSO製冷器具能效標籤標準；聲明的數值須對應科威特240 V、50 Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: GSO energy-label standard for refrigerating appliances (GCC Standardization Organization) — label format, rating band, and content requirements
IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for the declared energy figures (as adopted by GSO)
KUCAS (PAI) — label rating verified within the technical evaluation; importer responsible for correct labelling
Arabic-language labelling at point of sale (Kuwait/GCC requirement)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is governed by the China Energy Label (CEL) system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, in Chinese. Labels are administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR; manufacturers self-declare grade based on testing against GB 12021.2. The Chinese CEL is in Chinese, uses a 1-to-5 grade rather than the GSO band/star rating, and cannot be used as the Kuwait label — a separate GSO/Kuwait Arabic-language label is required.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识制度依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订版）实施，采用中国能效标识（CEL）体系，以中文展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量。标识由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测结果自我声明能效等级。中国CEL为中文、采用1至5级而非GSO区间/星级评级，不能作为科威特标签使用——须另行加贴GSO/科威特阿拉伯文标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識制度依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂版）實施，採用中國能效標識（CEL）體系，以中文展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量。標識由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測結果自我聲明能效等級。中國CEL為中文、採用1至5級而非GSO區間/星級評級，不能作為科威特標籤使用——須另行加貼GSO/科威特阿拉伯文標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two label-specific gaps: (1) Different label and language — the Chinese 1-to-5 grade CEL in Chinese cannot serve as the Kuwait label; a GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label in Arabic (typically bilingual), showing the GSO band/star rating and the annual energy consumption, must be produced and applied before goods are offered for sale. (2) Rating re-derivation — the label rating must be re-derived from the GSO efficiency band (not the Chinese grade) using IEC 62552 energy data tied to the 240 V / 50 Hz rating, and verified within KUCAS. The registered Kuwait importer is responsible for ensuring the correct label is applied; absence of a compliant GSO label is a market-surveillance and clearance issue.
gap.zh: 两项标签专属差距：（1）标签与语言不同——中文1至5级CEL不能充当科威特标签；须制作并加贴GSO/科威特阿拉伯文（通常双语）能效标签，标注GSO区间/星级评级及年耗电量，并在发售前加贴。（2）评级重新推导——标签评级须基于GSO能效区间（而非中国等级）重新推导，使用与240 V / 50 Hz额定值绑定的IEC 62552能效数据，并在KUCAS内核验。注册的科威特进口商负责确保加贴正确标签；缺少合规GSO标签将构成市场监管和清关问题。
gap.zht: 兩項標籤專屬差距：（1）標籤與語言不同——中文1至5級CEL不能充當科威特標籤；須製作並加貼GSO/科威特阿拉伯文（通常雙語）能效標籤，標注GSO區間/星級評級及年耗電量，並在發售前加貼。（2）評級重新推導——標籤評級須基於GSO能效區間（而非中國等級）重新推導，使用與240 V / 50 Hz額定值綁定的IEC 62552能效數據，並在KUCAS內核驗。註冊的科威特進口商負責確保加貼正確標籤；缺少合規GSO標籤將構成市場監管和清關問題。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label (Arabic) must be applied before refrigerators are offered for sale; label rating verified within KUCAS and the importer is responsible for correct labelling
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: Public Authority for Industry (PAI) — KUCAS, Kuwait / GSO energy label

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An Arabic-language GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label is mandatory before refrigerators are offered for sale in Kuwait. The Chinese 1-to-5 China Energy Label does not satisfy this — the rating must be re-derived from the GSO efficiency band using IEC 62552 data tied to the 240 V / 50 Hz rating and verified within KUCAS, with the registered importer responsible for correct labelling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在科威特发售电冰箱前，须加贴阿拉伯文GSO/科威特能效标签。中国1至5级能效标识不满足该要求——评级须基于GSO能效区间、使用与240 V / 50 Hz额定值绑定的IEC 62552数据重新推导并在KUCAS内核验，且由注册进口商负责正确加贴。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在科威特發售電冰箱前，須加貼阿拉伯文GSO/科威特能效標籤。中國1至5級能效標識不滿足該要求——評級須基於GSO能效區間、使用與240 V / 50 Hz額定值綁定的IEC 62552數據重新推導並在KUCAS內核驗，且由註冊進口商負責正確加貼。
